rag_rules: Place assumptions in component type annexes; place guarantees in component type annexes only if they reference visible inputs and outputs, not implementation subcomponent paths.
Use implementation annexes only for assign statements tied to existing outputs or auxiliary variables, never for guarantees.
generic_rules: Relate visible outputs directly to visible inputs in guarantees, avoiding intermediate subcomponent references.
Declare constants and equations using only AGREE scalar types: int, real, bool.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annexes use the syntax: annex agree {** ... **};
Guarantees must express deterministic dependencies using only in-scope identifiers.
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-level subcomponent ports in component type contracts.
Do not convert Boolean ports into numeric comparisons unless explicitly typed as int/real in AADL.
